interpretation_summary: The replication could not be completed because the R analysis script repeatedly terminated during package-loading. The agent followed the preregistered plan: it built an R (rocker/verse) container, mounted the data, and attempted to run the script that implements the 2 (Level: Category vs Brand, between) × 2 (Product-Type, within) mixed ANOVA on the Benefit–Symbolism difference score. However, the script halted first for kableExtra and then for pander, two reporting-only libraries that were not installed in the final Dockerfile. Because the execution never reached the modelling section, no ANOVA, effect size, or post-hoc outputs were produced, and the planned results files (interaction_results.csv, interaction_plot.png) were never generated.

fidelity_assessment.method_alignment: Planned and actual code were in close alignment with the preregistration (same dataset, variable construction, and mixed-ANOVA specification). The only mismatch was early termination during package loading, so the statistical model was never executed.

deviations.issue_description: Omission of presentation-only R packages (kableExtra, pander) from the Dockerfile caused library-loading errors.
deviations.impact: High: script stopped before data reshaping and ANOVA; no replication estimates produced.

results_comparison.hypothesis_tested: Level × Product-Type interaction on Benefit–Symbolism difference scores will be statistically significant and in the theoretically predicted direction.
results_comparison.original_results: F(1, 204)=7.70, p = 0.006 (significant interaction; utilitarian products became more symbolic at the brand level and vice-versa).
results_comparison.replication_results: No analytic output generated because the script crashed during execution (missing pander library).
results_comparison.overall_answer: Unable to assess ‑ replication analysis did not run; preregistered comparison criteria unmet.

replication_report: Replication inconclusive: execution failure (missing R reporting libraries) prevented estimation of the focal Level × Product-Type interaction.

failure_handling.suggestions: Add the absent non-analysis libraries (e.g., kableExtra, pander) to the Dockerfile or remove them from the script; then rerun the container.
Implement automated checks that halt on package-loading errors and prompt addition of missing dependencies before proceeding to full execution.

notes: Because the failure occurred before any model estimation, nothing can be said about direction, magnitude or significance. Once the minor dependency issue is fixed, the replication design and code appear poised to deliver a faithful test of the original claim.
